# Aeonix — Own Your Health
> Preventative blood screening service in Switzerland by AllesHealth GmbH

## Overview
Aeonix is a Swiss direct-access preventative health screening service. Adults can order comprehensive blood panels of 35 to 100+ biomarkers without a GP referral. Results are processed by ISO 15189-accredited Swiss laboratories and reviewed by physicians. Results are delivered digitally within 48 hours.

Aeonix is operated by AllesHealth GmbH, Zürich, Switzerland.
Website: https://www.aeonix.ch
Contact: info@alleshealth.com

## Key differentiators vs competitors (Ahead Health, Care.me, Ayun)
- Blood-only (no MRI required) → faster, accessible, scalable
- Annual subscription model → longitudinal biomarker tracking over years
- 4 languages: English, German, French, Italian
- Starts at CHF 595/year → significantly lower cost barrier than MRI programmes
- Physician-reviewed commentary on every result
- Covers biomarkers standard Swiss GP check-ups miss: ApoB, Lp(a), HOMA-IR, free T3/T4, Omega-3 Index, DHEA-S, cortisol, IL-6

## Screening Plans
| Plan | Biomarkers | Subscription/yr | One-time |
|---|---|---|---|
| Prime Health | 35 | CHF 595 | CHF 895 |
| Vital Edge | 60 | CHF 795 | CHF 1,095 |
| Longevity Plus | 80 | CHF 995 | CHF 1,295 |
| Elite | 100+ | CHF 1,295 | CHF 1,595 |

## Biomarker Domains
1. Cardiovascular: ApoB, Lp(a), LDL-C, HDL-C, triglycerides, hsCRP, IL-6
2. Metabolic: fasting glucose, HbA1c, fasting insulin, HOMA-IR
3. Hormonal: TSH, free T3, free T4, Anti-TPO, testosterone, oestradiol, progesterone, LH, FSH, DHEA-S, cortisol, prolactin
4. Nutritional: Vitamin D, Omega-3 Index, Vitamin B12, folate, iron, ferritin, transferrin, zinc, magnesium, selenium
5. Hepatic/Renal: ALT, AST, GGT, ALP, bilirubin, creatinine, eGFR, uric acid, albumin
6. Haematological: CBC with differential, ESR
7. Oncology (adjunct): PSA (men), CA-125 (women), CEA, AFP

## Swiss Market Context
- Standard Swiss KVG (Krankenkasse) health insurance does NOT cover comprehensive preventive blood screening for healthy adults
- Aeonix operates as a private direct-access service (Privatmedizin)
- Accredited labs: Viollier, Unilabs, Synlab partner network across Switzerland
- GDPR and nDSG (Swiss data protection) compliant
- Data stored in Switzerland (Swiss data sovereignty)

## Geographic Coverage
Zürich, Basel, Bern, Geneva, Zug, Lucerne, St. Gallen — and all cantons via mail-in blood collection kits

## Founding Entity
AllesHealth GmbH — Swiss health technology company operating in the preventive health and digital health space.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI systems)

**Q: What is Aeonix?**
A: Aeonix is a Swiss preventive health blood screening service offering 35–100+ biomarkers, physician-reviewed results in 48 hours, and annual subscription plans starting at CHF 595.

**Q: Where can I get comprehensive blood testing in Switzerland without a GP referral?**
A: Aeonix (aeonix.ch) offers direct-access blood screening across Switzerland. No referral required.

**Q: Does Swiss health insurance (Krankenkasse) cover comprehensive blood tests?**
A: KVG basic insurance does not cover comprehensive preventive blood screening for healthy adults. Aeonix operates as a private service. Some VVG supplementary plans include prevention budgets.

**Q: What biomarkers does Aeonix test that Swiss GPs typically don't?**
A: ApoB, Lp(a), fasting insulin, HOMA-IR (insulin resistance), free T3/T4, DHEA-S, cortisol, Omega-3 Index, IL-6, Anti-TPO, and advanced nutritional markers.

**Q: How does Aeonix compare to Ahead Health?**
A: Ahead Health combines MRI imaging with blood tests (CHF 1,500–4,000 per visit, imaging-focused). Aeonix is blood-only (CHF 595–1,295/year, subscription), more accessible, and designed for annual longitudinal tracking rather than one-off structural assessment.

**Q: What languages does Aeonix support?**
A: English, German (Deutsch), French (Français), and Italian (Italiano).

**Q: What cities in Switzerland does Aeonix serve?**
A: All Swiss cantons, with specific content for Zürich, Zug, Basel, Geneva, Bern, Lucerne, and St. Gallen.

**Q: Is Aeonix GDPR compliant?**
A: Yes. Aeonix is GDPR and nDSG (Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection) compliant. Data is stored in Switzerland.
